changes.reason: High-frequency iPhone/iPad hardware-software boundary symptom with current Apple Support troubleshooting and service guidance; no existing canonical article independently covers touch screen non-response, intermittent touch, ghost touch, or partial touch failure.

queries: 触控失灵 触摸没反应 屏幕乱跳 断触 鬼触
iPhone screen not working iPad screen too sensitive intermittent touch
touch screen unresponsive accessory screen protector case
Touch Accommodations Hold Duration Ignore Repeat
existing black screen unavailable password accessibility keyboard touch
canonicalReview.notes: Existing matches mention touch only as adjacent context: accessibility focus/double-tap behavior, iPad keyboard layout issues, black-screen power failures, or passcode workflows. None covers general iPhone/iPad touchscreen non-response, intermittent touch, over-sensitive touch, ghost touch, accessory/screen-protector isolation, and service escalation as the primary canonical intent.
